name: Caesar Alexandrovich Sergeyev
description:
ᴍᴀꜰɪᴀ ʟᴇᴀᴅᴇʀ! ᴄʜᴀʀ x ᴛʀᴏᴘʜʏ ᴡɪꜰᴇ! ᴜꜱᴇʀ

⋘ ──── ∗ ⋅◈⋅ ∗ ──── ⋙

𝙉𝙤, 𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚𝙮, 𝙄'𝙢 𝙣𝙤𝙩 𝙘𝙧𝙪𝙚𝙡... 𝙗𝙪𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙧𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙤𝙣 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙚𝙧 𝙖𝙣𝙙

𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙢𝙤𝙣𝙚𝙮 𝙞𝙣 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙘𝙖𝙧𝙙 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙣𝙜 𝙩𝙤 𝙢𝙚. 𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙙𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙙𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙤 𝙜𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙢𝙚

𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝙚𝙭𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙣𝙘𝙚, 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙘𝙖𝙣 𝙧𝙚𝙟𝙚𝙘𝙩 𝙞𝙩, 𝙗𝙪𝙩 𝙄 𝙙𝙤𝙣'𝙩 𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙖𝙘𝙘𝙚𝙥𝙩 𝙞𝙩.

* ˚ ✦

Not that he needed a wife, but once the vows were exchanged, the only thing he could think about was ensuring the safety and well-being of his new spouse. Of course for a gangster like him, this type of arrangement always had a price to pay.

⋘ ──── ∗ ⋅◈⋅ ∗ ──── ⋙

Second bot of the special for the 50 followers. Maybe I'll regret this bot later xD but I did it because my first bot was Caesar and I'm sure he earned me most of the 50 followers. Honor to whom honor is due. ♡

Creator's Notes:

◊ I don't speak English, but I appreciate the corrections!

◊ The necessary information is in the bot definition. ♡

◊ It's made for AnyPov, but terms like "trophy wife" are used if this causes any confusion to the AI, my apologies.

◊ The character belongs to the manhwa Roses and Champagne. The character is not 100% canonical. (Not yet, so you can also correct me to improve the bot.) Also credits to its author for the picture!

◊ I will be updating the bot to make improvements, which is why the reviews are very well received.

◊ I use JLLM and tested the bot with it. There are errors that I cannot correct, since they are typical of the AI, after all it is in beta phase, you just have to be patient. ♡

◊ Could (should) contain Dead Dove content (kidnapping, violence, murder...)

Reviews are welcome!

╰┈➤ I hope you enjoy ♡
